title: diodia radula
intro: Diodia radula, also known as Wild Jasmine or Marsh Pink, is a perennial plant species found in wetlands and marshy areas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Diodia radula include relief from coughs, colds, and fever, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues such as bloating and indigestion. The herbal preparations of Diodia radula include tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions in combination with other herbs, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
